title: /graph/mcp.md shipped — authoritative MCP architecture spec
summary: The architecture file ratified under D-258 is now durable on disk. People-graph IS the MCP server (no facade). One contract, two audiences, three scopes (read / write / propose). Signed-JWT auth with tenant·agent·scope claims, 60-second replay window, 30-day key rotation. Eval gates wired to Kernel's 21 MCP-specific probes (D-261); revocation triggers and scope-freshness windows documented. Threat model R17 (caller is itself persuadable) enumerated with what we mitigate, what we accept, and what we don't yet have an answer for. Roadmap names connector-write defer (D-262) and five items B016 must report on. Worked example traces a full Cordova match-bot call end-to-end.
